data.narrative:
Perigee Aerospace is a Series D-stage space and aerospace company that has raised $56.64M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a comp universe of 5 public tickers (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers, with particular relevance from same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables including Sierra Space ($8.0B, Series C), Apex Space ($2.3B, Series D), Varda Space Industries ($1.5B, Series C), and Skyryse ($1.1B, Series C).

Two valuation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.5x step-up multiplier to the $57M raised proxy, implying $85M. Peer-median analysis references the four same-sector comparables listed above, yielding a median valuation of $1.9B against a range of $1.1B to $8.0B. Public-comp anchoring cannot be applied due to the absence of disclosed revenue for the target company.

The triangulated analysis across two methods supports a range of $72M (low) to $2.2B (high), with a median of $992M. The wide spread reflects material dispersion within the private peer set, particularly the $8.0B Sierra Space outlier. Key uncertainties include stage-of-revenue maturity (Series D positioning relative to peer cohort maturity), technology commercialization timelines, and whether Perigee's specific subsector within aerospace commands sector-median multiples or warrants adjustment. The peer-median method carries greater weight given the stage-specific comparability of the sample.
